name: 10p12_NEBL_SD
description: 10p12.31 segmental duplication block over NEBL (nebulette) and flanking MLLT10 / SKIDA1. Contains intrachromosomal duplicons that share homology with the nebulin/nebulette gene family on chr2 (NEB) and chr8.

architecture.internal_structure: Repetitive nebulin-repeat coding modules; short SDs of 5-25 kb to NEB on chr2; flanking SDs predispose to MLLT10 translocations in T-ALL.
